results.title: Scott M. Reid: Battle of Barca 10s: Messi and Yamal meet in World Cup final
results.description: Futbol Club Barcelona’s No. 10 jersey is the most famous shirt in soccer, a sort of maroon and blue vertical striped cape passed down from one superhero to the next. “The world goes on and new geniuses emerge,” said Barcelona...

results.title: Gambhir-led Indian management breaks silence on Rohit Sharma amidst retirement rumours says, 'No pressure...'
results.description: The Indian team management has firmly dismissed assertions that former captain Rohit Sharma is under intense scrutiny from the team hierarchy.

results.title: Real Salt Lake Apologizes to J.J. Watt, Honors Kealia Ohai Watt in Social Media Post
results.description: Real Salt Lake has apologized to Kealia Ohai Watt and J.J. Watt after Ohai Watt was not recognized in a social media post on Wednesday.

results.title: Olympic cyclist Rohan Dennis facing jail after admitting to driving despite having disqualified license
results.description: A top former cyclist has admitted driving while disqualified and faces jail for breaching a bond imposed over events leading up to the death of his wife.
